name: 21 Construction Depot - 极简石材系列
description: 极简主义石材美学展示 H5

1800.name: MODEL 1800
1800.desc: 剥离繁冗，回归石材最原始的纯粹。以极简线条勾勒空间骨架，让静谧在留白中流淌。
1800.enDesc: Stripping away the redundant, returning to the primal purity of stone. Outlining the spatial skeleton with minimalist lines, letting tranquility flow in the void.

1807.name: MODEL 1807
1807.desc: 工业文明与自然造物的交响。粗犷的质感中蕴含着细腻的逻辑，展现力量与美感的平衡。
1807.enDesc: A symphony of industrial civilization and natural creation. Delicate logic embedded within rugged textures, showcasing the balance between power and beauty.

2802.name: MODEL 2802
2802.desc: 捕捉亿万年地壳运动留下的韵律。流动的纹理如江河入海，赋予冰冷石材温润的生命感。
2802.enDesc: Capturing the rhythm left by millions of years of tectonic movements. Flowing textures like rivers entering the sea, bestowing a warm sense of life upon the cold stone.

5021.name: MODEL 5021
5021.desc: 炽热而内敛，仿佛凝固的熔岩。展现大自然最原始、最狂野的生命力。
5021.enDesc: Fiery yet restrained, like solidified lava. Revealing the most primitive and wild vitality of nature.

6007.name: MODEL 6007
6007.desc: 如清晨的第一缕阳光，穿透薄雾，为空间带来温暖而柔和的质感。
6007.enDesc: Like the first ray of morning sun piercing through the mist, bringing a warm and soft texture to the space.

6107.name: MODEL 6107
6107.desc: 水墨般的纹理，在石材上挥洒自如。展现东方美学的深邃与灵动。
6107.enDesc: Ink-like textures splashing freely across the stone. Showcasing the depth and agility of Eastern aesthetics.

6108.name: MODEL 6108
6108.desc: 如远山青黛，层峦叠嶂。在石材的纹理中感受大山的厚重与宁静。
6108.enDesc: Like distant green mountains and overlapping peaks. Feeling the weight and serenity of the mountains within the stone's texture.

6109.name: MODEL 6109
6109.desc: 澄澈如秋水，明净而深远。捕捉自然界最纯净的瞬间，定格于石材之上。
6109.enDesc: Clear as autumn water, bright and far-reaching. Capturing the purest moments of nature and freezing them upon the stone.

6361.name: MODEL 6361
6361.desc: 微小的矿物颗粒如星尘般闪耀，在深邃的基底上勾勒出宇宙的奥秘。
6361.enDesc: Tiny mineral particles shining like stardust, outlining the mysteries of the universe on a deep substrate.

682.name: MODEL 682
682.desc: 虚实交错的纹理，如同沙漠中的海市蜃楼，带给空间无限的遐想。
682.enDesc: Intertwining textures of reality and illusion, like a mirage in the desert, bringing infinite imagination to the space.

683.name: MODEL 683
683.desc: 深邃如幽谷，静谧而深远。石材的天然纹路在此刻化作大地的诗篇。
683.enDesc: Deep as a hidden valley, quiet and profound. The natural veins of the stone transform into a poetic chapter of the earth.

686.name: MODEL 686
686.desc: 轻盈如流云，灵动而自然。为沉稳的石材注入一份飘逸的灵性。
686.enDesc: Light as floating clouds, agile and natural. Injecting a sense of ethereal spirituality into the steady stone.

7002.name: MODEL 7002
7002.desc: 深邃的灰调如同破晓前的海面。在克制的色彩中探索空间的深度，营造极致的沉浸式美学。
7002.enDesc: Deep gray tones like the sea before dawn. Exploring spatial depth within restrained colors, creating an ultimate immersive aesthetic.

7005.name: MODEL 7005
7005.desc: 捕捉自然界最轻盈的呼吸。石材不再是沉重的存在，而是光影交织下的灵动注脚。
7005.enDesc: Capturing the lightest breath of nature. Stone is no longer a heavy existence, but an agile footnote under the interplay of light and shadow.

7059.name: MODEL 7059
7059.desc: 如黄昏时的余晖，温柔而深沉。为空间营造一份宁静而温馨的氛围。
7059.enDesc: Like the afterglow at dusk, gentle and deep. Creating a peaceful and warm atmosphere for the space.

7305.name: MODEL 7305
7305.desc: 冷峻而孤傲，展现石材在极端环境下的坚韧与纯粹。
7305.enDesc: Cold and aloof, showcasing the resilience and purity of stone under extreme environments.

9002.name: MODEL 9002
9002.desc: 大面积的金色纹理交织，营造出如宫殿般的辉煌气场，是尊贵身份的象征。
9002.enDesc: Interweaving large areas of golden textures, creating a magnificent aura like a palace, a symbol of noble status.

9002-A.name: MODEL 9002-A
9002-A.desc: 金色的纹理如流沙般穿梭其间，展现石材的高贵与奢华质感。
9002-A.enDesc: Golden textures flowing like shifting sands, showcasing the noble and luxurious quality of the stone.

9004.name: MODEL 9004
9004.desc: 极致的简约，不带一丝冗余。在纯粹的线条中寻找生活的真谛。
9004.enDesc: Ultimate simplicity without a trace of redundancy. Finding the truth of life within pure lines.

9012.name: MODEL 9012
9012.desc: 变幻莫测的纹路，如同光影下的幻象，赋予空间无限的动感。
9012.enDesc: Ever-changing patterns like illusions under light and shadow, giving the space infinite dynamic energy.

9030.name: MODEL 9030
9030.desc: 如深夜的湖面，波澜不惊。在静谧中感受石材带来的平和与安宁。
9030.enDesc: Like a midnight lake, calm and undisturbed. Feeling the peace and tranquility brought by the stone.

9031.name: MODEL 9031
9031.desc: 如黎明前的第一道曙光，打破黑暗，为空间注入希望与活力。
9031.enDesc: Like the first light before dawn, breaking the darkness and injecting hope and vitality into the space.

9042.name: MODEL 9042
9042.desc: 打破常规的几何构想，探索石材在未来维度中的表达。前卫、锐利，且富有哲思。
9042.enDesc: Breaking conventional geometric concepts, exploring the expression of stone in future dimensions. Avant-garde, sharp, and philosophical.

9088.name: MODEL 9088
9088.desc: 细腻的灰阶过渡，宛如远山在晨雾中若隐若现。为空间注入一份朦胧而高级的艺术诗意。
9088.enDesc: Delicate grayscale transitions, like distant mountains appearing faintly in the morning mist. Injecting a hazy and high-end artistic poetry into the space.

9093.name: MODEL 9093
9093.desc: 光影在石材表面跳跃，展现出多维度的视觉魅力，灵动而高级。
9093.enDesc: Light and shadow dancing on the stone surface, revealing multi-dimensional visual charm, agile and sophisticated.

9094.name: MODEL 9094
9094.desc: 独特的矿物结晶捕捉每一缕微光。在不同角度的审视下，展现石材多维度的流光魅力。
9094.enDesc: Unique mineral crystals capturing every ray of light. Revealing the shimmering charm of stone from different perspectives.

9103.name: MODEL 9103
9103.desc: 极致的黑，是所有色彩的终点，也是想象力的起点。在无声的深邃中，定义空间的绝对权威。
9103.enDesc: Absolute black, the end of all colors and the starting point of imagination. Defining the absolute authority of space in silent depth.

9139.name: MODEL 9139
9139.desc: 柔和的色泽中蕴含着大地的温度。如冬日暖阳洒在石阶上，为居家空间带来一份治愈的温馨。
9139.enDesc: Earthly warmth within soft hues. Like winter sun shining on stone steps, bringing a healing warmth to the home.

9154.name: MODEL 9154
9154.desc: 厚重的大地色系，承载着岁月的稳重。以磐石之姿，为现代建筑奠定坚实的审美基石。
9154.enDesc: Heavy earth tones carrying the stability of years. Laying a solid aesthetic foundation for modern architecture with a monolithic presence.

9181.name: MODEL 9181
9181.desc: 剔透的质感仿佛万年不化的冰川。冷冽而高洁，在纯净的视觉体验中洗涤心灵的浮躁。
9181.enDesc: A translucent texture like glaciers that never melt for ten thousand years. Cold and noble, cleansing the soul's restlessness in a pure visual experience.

9186.name: MODEL 9186
9186.desc: 融合古典艺术的厚重与现代设计的灵动。每一道纹路都是时间的刻痕，讲述着跨越时空的审美故事。
9186.enDesc: Merging the weight of classical art with the agility of modern design. Every vein is a mark of time, telling an aesthetic story that spans across eras.

9237.name: MODEL 9237
9237.desc: 灵动的纹路如风吹过沙漠留下的印记。在静止的石材中展现动态的幻影。
9237.enDesc: Agile veins like imprints left by the wind blowing across the desert. Revealing dynamic phantoms within the static stone.

9243.name: MODEL 9243
9243.desc: 极致的白，不染尘埃。如初雪覆盖大地，在无限的纯净中，拓宽空间的视觉边界。
9243.enDesc: Ultimate white, untainted by dust. Like fresh snow covering the earth, broadening the visual boundaries of space in infinite purity.

9257.name: MODEL 9257
9257.desc: 璀璨的矿物颗粒如星辰散落。在深邃的基底上，勾勒出一幅永恒的宇宙画卷，浪漫且神秘。
9257.enDesc: Brilliant mineral particles scattered like stars. Outlining an eternal cosmic scroll on a deep base, romantic and mysterious.

P012.name: MODEL P012
P012.desc: 为极致审美而生，展现石材的独特魅力与尊贵气质。
P012.enDesc: Born for the ultimate aesthetic, showcasing the unique charm and noble temperament of the stone.

P013.name: MODEL P013
P013.desc: 追求极致的完美，每一处细节都经过精心雕琢，展现石材的巅峰之美。
P013.enDesc: Pursuing ultimate perfection, every detail is meticulously carved, showcasing the pinnacle beauty of the stone.
